expectations.evidence: All present: ## Problem (L10), ## Solution (L14), ## Scope (L18), ## Acceptance Criteria (L36), ## Design Decisions (L46), ### Failure Modes (L62), ## Risks & Open Questions (L69), ## Alternatives Considered (L77), ## Verification (L85).

expectations.text: no_code_fences: Zero triple-backtick code fences outside Implementation Notes
expectations.evidence: No triple-backtick code fences anywhere in the file. No Implementation Notes section exists either.

expectations.text: no_ts_interfaces: Design Decisions has NO 'interface ', ': string', ': number', TS syntax
expectations.evidence: Design Decisions (L48-61) contains no 'interface ', ': string', or ': number'. Uses backticked identifiers like `useMemo`, `useEffect`, field names, but no TypeScript type annotation syntax.

expectations.text: no_json_shapes: Design Decisions has NO JSON-like shapes or data structure defs
expectations.evidence: L56: 'returns `{ success: false, message }`' is a JSON-like object shape. L52: 'Each panel entry contains `id`, `title`, `type`, a `latestValue`... Variables include `name`, `current`, and `options`' defines data structure fields. Both are in Design Decisions.
L23: 'existing `Dashboard.tsx` component' contains .tsx. L24: '`suggestedPromptsByPage.ts`' contains .ts. Both in In Scope section.

expectations.text: spec_under_120_lines: â‰¤120 lines excluding Implementation Notes
expectations.evidence: File is 110 lines total. No Implementation Notes section exists. 110 â‰¤ 120.

expectations.text: bold_topic_sentences: >80% of Design Decisions paragraphs open with bold decision sentence
expectations.evidence: 7/7 paragraphs open bold: L48 '**Follow the existing three-hook...**', L50 '**Use the `useLatestRef` pattern...**', L52 '**Context payload includes...**', L54 '**Mutating tools require confirmation...**', L56 '**Tool handlers never throw.**', L58 '**Hash-based tab navigation...**', L60 '**The `set_template_variable` tool...**'. 100%.

expectations.text: implementer_can_start: Competent dev can start from spec alone
expectations.evidence: Names three-hook pattern, references Alerts implementation as template, lists all 8 tools by name, describes context payload structure, specifies Zustand + react-query state management, describes useLatestRef pattern, confirmation gates, error handling. File locations in Verification. Sufficient to start.

expectations.text: no_implementation_leaks: Design Decisions does NOT prescribe HOW at React hook level
expectations.evidence: L50: 'tool handlers are memoized via `useMemo`' and 'The ref is updated on every render via `useEffect`' â€” both prescribe specific React hooks (useMemo, useEffect) as implementation detail, same level as useState/useRef.

expectations.text: failure_modes_are_policy: >50% failure modes are genuine policy decisions
expectations.evidence: 5/5 are policy: (1) null latestValue + systemPrompt instruction for loading data, (2) minimal state + error flag when dashboard not found, (3) return failure + don't exit edit mode on save fail, (4) return failure listing valid options for bad variable, (5) truncate at 30 panels with truncated flag. 100%.

expectations.text: scope_is_behavioral: >80% In Scope items are behavioral capabilities
expectations.evidence: 6 items: (1) hook name + behavior â€” mixed, (2) hook name + type â€” mixed, (3) 'Wiring both hooks into Dashboard.tsx' â€” implementation task, (4) 'Adding dashboard entry to suggestedPromptsByPage.ts' â€” implementation task with filename, (5) confirmation gates â€” behavioral, (6) context payload with metric summaries â€” behavioral. At best 4/6 (67%) behavioral, below 80% threshold.

expectations.text: has_acceptance_criteria: 4-8 behavioral checkbox items with observable outcomes
expectations.evidence: 8 checkbox items (L37-44), all behavioral/observable: FAB appears/disappears, LLM receives state, user can ask analytical question, tools perform UI actions, confirmation required for mutations, suggested prompts appear, tab navigation preserves chat, leaving page clears tools.

expectations.text: verification_agent_actionable: Has Agent-Verifiable subsection with actionâ†’outcome checks
expectations.evidence: ### Agent-Verifiable (L93-101) has 7 actionâ†’outcome checks: file existence + signature checks, grep-based verification of hook call ordering, suggested prompts entry, confirmation flags, error handling patterns, and context payload fields.

expectations.text: has_appetite: Header has Appetite field with real time-budget value
expectations.evidence: L5: '**Appetite:** Small Batch (~1-2 weeks)' â€” present with concrete time budget.

expectations.text: has_boundary_tiers: Design Decisions has â‰Ą2 boundary-tier statements
expectations.evidence: 5 boundary-tier statements: L52 '**Always:** include currentTab, isEditing...', L52 '**Never:** include raw datapoint arrays...', L54 '**Always:** require confirmation for toggle_edit_mode and save_dashboard', L54 '**Ask First:** whether set_time_range should require confirmation', L54 '**Never:** require confirmation for navigate_to_tab, select_panel...'.
